data.title: Former South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol Faces Criminal Trial for Rebellion Charges
data.description:
According to PANews, a South Korean court official announced on April 13 that the first criminal trial of former President Yoon Suk-yeol is scheduled for April 14. Yoon will be the fifth former South Korean president to face a criminal trial. If found guilty of leading a rebellion, he could face life imprisonment or the death penalty.

The trial will take place at the Seoul Central District Court at 10 a.m. local time (UTC+8) on April 14. As the defendant, Yoon is required to attend the court proceedings.

data.title: LISTA briefly hit $0.1880, possibly affected by CZ's forwarding
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LISTA briefly touched $0.1880 and is now trading at $0.1560. The market fluctuations may be affected by the forwarding of relevant content by Binance founder CZ.

data.title: Lista DAO’s lending product Lista Lending is now available on USD1 Vault, marking the first application of USD1 on BNB Chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Lista DAO's lending product Lista Lending has launched USD1 Vault, which is the first application of Trump's crypto project WLFI's USD stablecoin USD1 on BNB Chain. USD1 Vault provides a USD1 quota worth 20 million US dollars. Users can mortgage BTCB to borrow USD1 with an interest rate as low as 0.93%. wBNB and slisBNB collateral will be launched soon.

data.title: Trump to Announce Update on Semiconductor Tariff Policy
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced plans to release an update on his administration's semiconductor tariff policy. The announcement is scheduled for Monday, as reported by Reuters. This update is expected to address ongoing trade issues and the impact of tariffs on the semiconductor industry.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin to VIX ratio has hit a long-term trendline, which may mark a bottom for Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analyst James Van Straten said that the S&P Volatility Index surged to its highest level since August last year this morning, indicating increased market uncertainty. James also said that the ratio of Bitcoin to VIX has hit a long-term trend line, which historically has previously marked the bottom of Bitcoin during major market events, followed by a price rebound.

data.title: Expert Analyst Warns Bitcoin/VIX Is Not Bullish: Bear Market Signals
data.description:
Technical expert Tony Severino has warned that the Bitcoin/VIX is not as bullish as market participants might believe. Instead, the expert revealed that the current indicators point to the flagship crypto being in a bear market. Bitcoin/VIX Points To A Bear Market: Analyst In an X post, Severino warned that the Bitcoin/VIX isn’t bullish as some crypto influencers might paint it out to be. He remarked that the technical analysis of it suggests that the current signals are what market participants tend to see during Bitcoin bear markets
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/expert-analyst-warns-bitcoin-vix-is-not-bullish-bear-market-signals/
